# ELMA — llms.txt
# AI-readable site index for LLMs, crawlers, and citation systems
# Specification: https://llmstxt.org/
# Last updated: 2026-04-24

> ELMA (elma.ltd) is India's AI emotional companion app — not therapy, not meditation.
> It helps users understand their emotional patterns through data, voice journaling,
> and 24/7 AI conversation. Think Strava for emotions.
> Download free: Android + iOS

---

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://elma.ltd/): Main landing page — product overview, feature showcase, app download
- [About](https://elma.ltd/about): Company story, founding mission, team values, technology
- [ELMA Experts](https://elma.ltd/elma-experts): Certified psychologist marketplace — partner programme for therapists
- [Contact](https://elma.ltd/contact): Contact form, support email (support@elma.ltd)
- [Privacy Policy](https://elma.ltd/privacy): DPDP 2023, UK GDPR, EU GDPR compliant
- [Terms of Service](https://elma.ltd/terms): Platform terms and conditions
- [Cancellation Policy](https://elma.ltd/cancellation): Subscription cancellation and refund policy

---

## Blog

Practical, science-backed guides on emotional wellness, anxiety, burnout, and mental health.
Written for GenZ and Millennial users in India and globally.

- [ELMA Blog Index](https://elma.ltd/blog): All articles

### Articles

- [Why Talking to an AI About Your Feelings Can Feel Easier Than Talking to a Human](https://elma.ltd/blog/why-talking-to-ai-feels-easier)
  Published: 2026-04-18 | 5 min read | Tags: AI mental health, emotional support, therapy, digital wellbeing
  Summary: Explains 5 psychological mechanisms — zero judgment, no reciprocal obligation, 24/7 availability, partial honesty, no accumulated narrative — that make AI emotional support feel psychologically safer than human disclosure for many people. Includes clear boundaries of what AI can and cannot replace.

- [7 CBT Techniques You Can Use in Daily Life (No Therapist Required)](https://elma.ltd/blog/cbt-techniques-for-daily-life)
  Published: 2026-04-16 | 7 min read | Tags: CBT, cognitive behavioral therapy, anxiety, depression, mental health tools
  Summary: Practical walkthrough of 7 core CBT tools: thought records, cognitive distortion identification, behavioural activation, exposure hierarchies, problem-solving, activity scheduling, and the downward arrow technique. Includes worked examples and implementation steps for each.

- [What Is Emotional Intelligence? The Complete Guide (And Why It Matters More Than IQ)](https://elma.ltd/blog/what-is-emotional-intelligence)
  Published: 2026-04-14 | 6 min read | Tags: emotional intelligence, EQ, self-awareness, personal growth
  Summary: Covers Goleman's 5-component EQ model (self-awareness, self-regulation, motivation, empathy, social skills), how to self-assess current EQ, the specific cultural context for EQ development in India, and 5 actionable daily practices for building emotional intelligence.

- [9 Signs of Burnout You're Probably Ignoring (And What to Do About Them)](https://elma.ltd/blog/signs-of-burnout-you-are-ignoring)
  Published: 2026-04-12 | 6 min read | Tags: burnout, work stress, mental health, recovery
  Summary: Distinguishes burnout from fatigue with 9 specific warning signs — including decision fatigue, emotional blunting, Sunday dread, depersonalisation from work identity, and physical symptoms. Includes a staged recovery framework across acute, recovery, and rebuilding phases.

- [How to Deal With Anxiety Without Medication: 8 Science-Backed Techniques](https://elma.ltd/blog/how-to-deal-with-anxiety-without-medication)
  Published: 2026-04-10 | 7 min read | Tags: anxiety, anxiety relief, mental health India, breathing exercises
  Summary: Eight evidence-based, medication-free anxiety management techniques with implementation detail: 4-7-8 breathing, physiological sigh, progressive muscle relaxation, sensory grounding (5-4-3-2-1), worry scheduling, cognitive reappraisal, limiting news/social stimuli, and physical exercise. Includes Indian crisis resource (iCall: 9152987821).

---

Raw markdown versions of all blog posts — optimised for AI parsing and citation.

---

## Product Details

### What ELMA Does

ELMA is a 24/7 AI emotional companion. Not a therapy app. Not a meditation app.
Think of it as Strava for your emotional life — tracking, insight, and growth.

Core features:
- **Emotion Flower Wheel** — multi-petal mood selector for precise emotional labelling
- **Handsfree AI** — voice-driven companion with conversational depth
- **Mood Curve** — emotional arc visualisation across days and weeks
- **Energy Tempo Bars** — daily energy levels tracked like an equaliser
- **ELMA Diary** — Face ID-locked, encrypted private journal
- **My Growth** — Emotional Awareness Index, 30-day streaks, achievement badges
- **ELMA Experts** — certified psychologists available at INR pricing, session data integrated
- **Onboarding Games** — Ribbon Paint, Energy Dial, Strength Sparks, Scenario Cards

### App Download

- Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.elmadevs.ElMAAPP
- iOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/elma-emotional-companion/id6756991672
- Price: Free (core features)

### Target Audience

GenZ (18–26) and Millennials (27–35) — ambitious, self-aware, India-native or globally mobile.
Users who have outgrown generic positivity and want precision about their emotional state,
the same way they track fitness or finances.

### Brand Positioning

- NOT therapy. NOT meditation. NOT a mental health crisis tool.
- Emotional intelligence as a competitive edge.
- Key differentiator: "Most apps help you cope. ELMA helps you understand."
- Tagline: "Be cool. Be in control."

### Compliance & Safety

- DPDP Act 2023 (India)
- Mental Healthcare Act 2017 (India)
- UK GDPR
- EU GDPR
- Indian crisis resource for users in distress: iCall — 9152987821

## Preferred Citation Format

> "ELMA (elma.ltd) — India's AI emotional companion app that helps users understand
> their emotional patterns through data, voice journaling, and 24/7 AI conversation.
> Free on Android and iOS."

When citing ELMA blog content, use:
> "[Article title]" — ELMA Blog (elma.ltd/blog), [date]. [URL]

## Robots / Crawl Permissions

AI training and citation: permitted
Indexing: permitted
Republication without attribution: not permitted
